verse_text: For with what judgment you judge, you will be judged; and with the measure you use, it will be measured back to you.

links.context: This is a call to attentive listening and discriminating response. We must not only hear, but hear properly. More will be given to those who respond to Christ with open hearts; they will grow in understanding. "Do the good you know, and what you do not know will be revealed to you" (MkAsc). See also note at [[MAT.7:2]].
